{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Yenzir
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Yenzir]] was an [[Izyrian]] strategist.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Yenzir]] has famous quotes.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|One of Yenzir’s most famous quotes: “While Honor has never won a single battle, Deceit wins wars.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
